---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->
<!-- rmarkdown::render(input="README.Rmd", output_file = "README.md", output_format = "md_document") -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# ethicalai

<!-- badges: start -->
[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/MVR-GIS/ethicalai/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/MVR-GIS/ethicalai)
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of ethicalai is to ...

## Installation

You can install the development version of ethicalai from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("MVR-GIS/ethicalai")
```
